description_long: This bungalow features a modern, rectangular layout with a flat roof and a mix of white, brown, and red exterior finishes. The property is enclosed by a wooden fence and includes a small, landscaped front yard with two prominent trees and a paved walkway leading to the entrance. The structure appears to have large windows and sliding doors, providing ample natural light and a connection to the outdoor spaces. The rear of the bungalow opens to a private garden area, while the front is accessible from a sidewalk or driveway. The overall design is compact and efficient, with a single story and a focus on outdoor integration. The materials and landscaping suggest a contemporary urban residential setting.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, wooden fencing, landscaped yard, and large windows, set in an urban context.
description_view_0: Front view showing the entrance, walkway, and two large trees flanking the path, with the fence and main door visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow, the wooden fence, and the flat roof, with both trees visible at the front and rear.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the private garden area, back entrance, and the continuation of the fence, with landscaping details.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back fence, garden, and the flat roofline, with both trees positioned at the corners of the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
